sections.paragraph:
Original: זנוח

Transliteration: zânôach

Phonetic: zaw-no'-akh

BDB Definition:

Zanoah = "cast off"
  1. a city in the low country of Judah
  2. a city in the mountains of Judah, perhaps southwest of Hebron

Origin: from H2186

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
